notes: Connecticut uses Salary Group (SG) classification system with 9-step progression. Exact rates pending verification against CT DAS Salary Plans (2024–2025).
bargaining_status: AFSCME Local 714 / SEBAC P-2 (Social and Human Services), CBA 2017 → 2027
administering_agency: Connecticut Department of Social Services (DSS), Disability Determination Services Unit

Disability Determination Examiner.notes: Typical range for CT state DDS examiner roles; exact SG assignment requires CT DAS confirmation

Disability Determination Examiner Superv.bargaining_unit: SEBAC P-3 (Supervisory) or separate supervisory unit
Disability Determination Examiner Superv.notes: First-line supervisor level in CT pay structure; may be in separate supervisory bargaining unit

Cross-reference exact class codes and salary groups from CT DAS spec system
